name: designannotator
description: Browser overlay that lets you annotate UI elements and send structured feedback to AI coding agents

scripts.build:cli: vite build && bun build cli/index.ts --outfile dist/design-annotator --compile
scripts.build:cli:all: vite build && bun build cli/index.ts --outfile dist/design-annotator-darwin-arm64 --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 && bun build cli/index.ts --outfile dist/design-annotator-darwin-x64 --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 && bun build cli/index.ts --outfile dist/design-annotator-linux-x64 --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 && bun build cli/index.ts --outfile dist/design-annotator-linux-arm64 --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64
